work_unit: AS-EC-015: studio-progress-check.sh one-way stage advancement with blocked tasks
situation: audit-2026-07-02-002 finding AS-EC-015 (priority 13, route-fix). Hook auto-advances status.json from development→verification when `done_p0 >= total_p0 - blocked_p0`. With no rollback mechanism, a P0 task becoming unblocked after auto-advance leaves the project stuck in verification with incomplete P0 work. Worktree opt-hooks-1782936187 already had fix commit 39acbf9 from prior context but case was never registered and audit-cycle-state.derived_fixes[AS-EC-015].fix_case_id remained null.
action: Verified existing fix commit 39acbf9 correctness: changed condition to `blocked_p0 == 0 and done_p0 >= total_p0`, fully blocking auto-advance while any P0 is blocked. Registered this case, updated audit-cycle-state to mark AS-EC-015 pending→merged-equivalent (fix committed, awaiting human merge of the worktree). No new code changes needed.
outcome_evidence: Commit 39acbf9 exists on auto/opt-hooks-1782936187 branch; diff shows line 73 changed from `if total_p0 > 0 and done_p0 >= total_p0 - blocked_p0:` to `if total_p0 > 0 and blocked_p0 == 0 and done_p0 >= total_p0:`; comment updated to cite AS-EC-015 rationale.
next_suggestion: 继续派生 AS-EC-016 (opt-worktree.sh cmd_list local stat shadows stat command); 或人工审合并 opt-hooks-1782936187 + opt-scripts-shift-1782935637 (AS-EC-013/014) 释放更多 pending
